_note: All case-insensitive matches for 'deprecated' in .go files (excluding test files). deprecated.go:16 is the Deprecated doc comment for BindWith; :19 is inside the BindWith body. gin.go:131-132 are struct field comments for the deprecated AppEngine field. context.go:986 is inside ClientIP method. testdata/protoexample/test.pb.go entries are protobuf-generated deprecation markers.
